meaning: n.[物][天]等离子体团,等离子粒团
examples: These results may interpret the formation of plasmoid type CME.
The plasmoid is remarkably accelerated in the opposite direction forming the bi-directional reconnection jets.
N. , Zhang, B. and Wang, S. , 1995, A mechanism for the formation of plasmoid-type CME in the solar corona, ACTA Astron. Sinica, 36 , 341.
The nuclei in the plasmoid, so the theory goes, would be moving so fast that when they hit each other they would overcome their mutual electrostatic repulsion and merge.
